name: claude-image-tts-gen
description: Multi-provider image and text-to-speech generation with cost tracking and batch mode.

gemini_api_key.title: Google Gemini API Key
gemini_api_key.description: Required — Gemini is the default provider for both image and TTS. Get a free key at aistudio.google.com/apikey. If you want to use a different provider as default (OpenAI / ElevenLabs / Local), you can still paste any non-empty string here and set your other key in the matching field below.

openai_api_key.title: OpenAI API Key
openai_api_key.description: Enables gpt-image-1 and OpenAI TTS tiers (tts-1, gpt-4o-mini-tts, tts-1-hd). platform.openai.com/api-keys.

openrouter_api_key.title: OpenRouter API Key
openrouter_api_key.description: Enables image passthrough to OpenRouter-hosted models. openrouter.ai/keys.

elevenlabs_api_key.title: ElevenLabs API Key
elevenlabs_api_key.description: Enables high-quality TTS and voice cloning via saved voice IDs. elevenlabs.io.

gemini_default_voice.title: Default Gemini TTS Voice
gemini_default_voice.description: Preferred default Gemini voice when no --voice is passed (e.g. Charon for male baritone, Kore for female). See list_providers for the full list.

openai_default_voice.title: Default OpenAI TTS Voice
openai_default_voice.description: Preferred default OpenAI voice (e.g. onyx for male, nova for female). Accepts alloy, echo, fable, onyx, nova, shimmer.

elevenlabs_default_voice.title: Default ElevenLabs Voice ID
elevenlabs_default_voice.description: Preferred default ElevenLabs voice ID (from Voice Lab). Paste the voice ID as-is, not the display name.

local_default_voice.title: Default Local TTS Voice
local_default_voice.description: Preferred default voice for the local provider (e.g. am_adam for Kokoro-FastAPI). Depends on your local backend.

local_base_url.title: Local Server Base URL
local_base_url.description: OpenAI-compatible local server base URL. Defaults to http://localhost:8880/v1 (Kokoro-FastAPI). Override for Orpheus-FastAPI :5005, Speaches :8000, LM Studio :1234, etc.

local_enabled.title: Include Local Provider in Failover
local_enabled.description: When true, the local provider is part of the failover chain. Default false. Local is always usable directly via --provider local regardless of this setting.

gemini_image_model.title: Gemini Image Model Override
gemini_image_model.description: Override the default Gemini image model. Leave empty for gemini-2.5-flash-image.

image_output_dir.title: Image Output Directory
image_output_dir.description: Default directory for generated images. Defaults to ./generated-images in the current working directory.

audio_output_dir.title: Audio Output Directory
audio_output_dir.description: Default directory for generated audio. Defaults to ./generated-audio in the current working directory.

state_dir.title: State Directory
state_dir.description: Override the state directory (session spend, cache, budget, batch jobs). Defaults to ~/.claude-image-tts-gen.

autoplay.title: Auto-Play TTS Output
autoplay.description: Auto-play TTS output via afplay on macOS after each generation. Default false.

rewrite_prompts.title: Enable Prompt Rewriter
rewrite_prompts.description: Run generated image prompts through the built-in MCP-sampling rewriter before sending to the provider. Default true.

emit_sidecar.title: Write Regenerate Sidecars
emit_sidecar.description: Write a hidden .regenerate.json sidecar next to each generated file for reproducibility. Default true.

log_level.title: Log Level
log_level.description: Log verbosity: error, warn, info, or debug. Default info.
